name: Pagaya Technologies Ltd.
business: Pagaya Technologies Ltd. is a product-focused technology company that deploys AI-powered technology to help financial institutions approve more consumer loans and other financial products. It generates revenue from network AI fees, contract fees, interest income, and investment income. The company serves financial institutions (Partners) and institutional investors through Financing Vehicles.

exposures.sentence: We are a product-focused technology company that deploys sophisticated data science and proprietary, AI-powered technology to enable better outcomes for financial institutions, their existing and potential customers, and institutional or sophisticated investors.
Our business began in personal loans and has expanded to auto loans, point-of-sale and single-family rental (SFR).

catalysts.event: Issued $500 million aggregate principal amount of 8.875% Senior Notes due 2030
catalysts.sentence: On July 28, 2025, the Company, through Pagaya US Holding Company LLC (Pagaya US), a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company, issued $500 million aggregate principal amount of 8.875% Senior Unsecured Notes due 2030 (the 2030 Notes).

catalysts.event: Refinanced revolving credit facility with new three-year facility
catalysts.sentence: On October 1, 2025, the Company refinanced the Revolving Credit Facility by way of terminating the Credit Agreement and entering into a new three-year revolving credit facility (the 2025 Revolving Credit Facility) with a syndicate of financial institutions.

catalysts.event: Repurchased $6.9 million of 2030 Notes in open market
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the Company repurchased approximately $6.9 million in aggregate principal amount of the outstanding 2030 Notes in several open market transactions.
In February 2026, the Company repurchased additional $7.4 million aggregate principal amount of the outstanding 2030 Notes.
